title: "The Creator God Is My Helper - Part 2" Acts 4:23-31

notes.introduction: An exposition of Acts 4:23-31 on the early disciples' prayer response to threats from the Sanhedrin, set alongside Hezekiah's response to the Assyrians in Isaiah 37 and Psalm 146:1-6, tracing how recognition of God as Creator shaped the disciples' request for boldness rather than removal of opposition.
themes: creation and the power of god

sections.heading: Review of Hezekiah and the Assyrians

The Content of the Disciples' Request
James, John, and the Contrast in Luke 9
What the Disciples Received: Boldness and the Spirit
